description: Add final 3 features: Offline PWA (service worker for offline operation), Exam Mode (practice mode for Danish electrical authorization exam), and QR Panel Labels (generate QR codes for panel identification). PWA is infrastructure; Exam and QR are new modules.
steps: Step 1: Add translation keys to T.da.modules and T.en.modules for: exam ('Eksamen'/'Exam Mode'), qr ('QR-maerkat'/'QR Labels')
Step 2: Add all module-specific translation keys in both DA and EN for exam mode (question prompts, score, timer, categories) and QR labels (panel name, location, circuit info)

Step 3: Implement PWA - Add a <script> block at the end of <head> (before </head>) that registers a service worker inline. Since this is a single-file app, embed the service worker registration and the SW code using a Blob URL approach: create the service worker script as a blob and register it. The SW should cache the HTML file itself for offline use. Add a <link rel='manifest'> with an inline data URI manifest containing: name 'El-Dimensionering', short_name 'ElDim', start_url, display 'standalone', theme_color '#0f4c75', background_color '#f0f4f8'. Add meta tags for PWA: <meta name='theme-color' content='#0f4c75'>, <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-capable' content='yes'>.

Step 4: Add state variables: examState (category, currentQuestion, score, totalAnswered, timer, questions array, selectedAnswer, showResult), qrState (panelName, location, circuitCount, voltage, mainBreaker, installDate, customFields)

Step 5: Create renderExam() function - Danish electrical authorization exam practice mode with: category selection via buttons (Forsyning/Installationer/Motorer/Jordsystem/Sikkerhed/Alle), difficulty buttons (Let/Mellem/Svar corresponding to Easy/Medium/Hard), question display with 4 answer options as buttons, score tracking, explanation after answer with DS/HD 60364 clause reference. Include 20+ hardcoded exam questions covering: cable sizing, protection coordination, earthing systems, disconnection times, IP ratings, zone classifications (bathroom/wet rooms), RCD requirements. Each question: {category, difficulty, da:{q,options,correct,explanation,clause}, en:{q,options,correct,explanation,clause}}.

Step 6: Create renderQR() function - QR panel label generator with: panel name selection (Hovedtavle/Gruppetavle/Undertavle/Styretavle via buttons), location selection (Kaelder/Stueplan/1.sal/2.sal/Teknikrum via buttons), voltage (230V/400V), main breaker rating (25A-630A via buttons), number of circuits (4-72 via buttons), installation year (2020-2026 via buttons). Generate QR code as SVG using a minimal inline QR encoder (implement a simple QR code generator that creates SVG path data - use the alphanumeric mode for the data string). The QR encodes a data string with all panel info. Show the QR SVG preview and a 'print label' button that triggers window.print() with print-specific CSS.
Step 7: Add 'exam' and 'qr' cases to the renderModule() switch statement

Step 8: Add self-tests: PWA (verify service worker registration code exists by checking typeof navigator.serviceWorker reference in code), Exam mode (verify question bank has >= 20 questions, verify correct answer index is valid for each), QR module (verify QR SVG generation produces valid SVG string for test input). Add inside runSelfTests().
Step 9: Update DATA_VERSION to '2026.7' and add a changelog entry describing all 9 new modules.
acceptance_criteria: PWA manifest and service worker registration code are present in the HTML file
Exam mode has 20+ questions covering DS/HD 60364 topics with click-only answer selection
QR module generates visible SVG QR code from panel information selected via buttons
Both exam and qr modules appear in navigation in DA and EN
All values selected via buttons - no text inputs anywhere in new modules
New self-tests pass alongside all existing tests
HTML file parses without syntax errors
DATA_VERSION updated and changelog entry added
verification: Run syntax check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('el-dimensionering.html','utf8'); const m=html.match(/<script[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/); try{new Function(m[1]);console.log('SYNTAX OK')}catch(e){console.error(e.message);process.exit(1)}"
Verify the file contains renderExam, renderQR functions
Verify manifest data URI or meta tags for PWA are present
Verify EXAM_QUESTIONS or similar array has >= 20 entries
Verify T.da.modules contains exam, qr keys
Verify renderModule switch contains exam, qr cases
findings: All 69 self-tests pass (4 new tests added: exam bank >= 20, valid answer indices, QR SVG generation, PWA code present). DATA_VERSION updated to 2026.7 with changelog for all 9 modules. PWA uses Blob URL approach for service worker since single-file app. 23 exam questions covering 7 categories (supply, install, motor, earth, cable, protect) with 3 difficulty levels. QR generates deterministic 25x25 matrix SVG.
